title: MembershipRenewal
description: Per-period audit row. APPEND-ONLY — no soft-delete, no update to core fields once the terminal status is set. One row per billing attempt; a single billing cycle can span up to 4 attempts (attempt_number 1..4) before terminating in either succeeded or failed_permanent. Belongs to Tenant (CASCADE) + Membership (RESTRICT). Optional refs: invoice_id (Invoice, RESTRICT), coupon_id (Coupon, RESTRICT — the coupon used on THIS renewal, which may differ from the membership's frozen coupon_snapshot). NEVER carries application_id / organization_id / region_id / scope_node_id.

notes: No SoftDeletes — renewals are append-only audit records. Retention is 7 years financial.
No HasActivityLog — every event is on the Membership side; renewal is internal accounting.

membership_id.description: RESTRICT — memberships cannot be hard-deleted while renewal audit rows reference them. Financial retention outlives the membership.

period_starts_at.description: The membership period this renewal covers — starts at membership.next_renewal_at when the renewal was created.

invoice_id.description: The Invoice created for this renewal cycle. Null until first attempt fires ChargeMembershipPaymentIntentJob.

amount_cents.description: Pre-tax pre-coupon. Recomputed from the CURRENT plan.price_cents at renewal time (NOT from the membership's frozen snapshot — plans can change mid-contract and renewals reflect the current price). If plan price differs from membership's frozen price_snapshot_cents, admin's intent decides which to bill (default = renew at frozen price for lifetime plan-price parity).

coupon_id.description: The coupon applied to THIS renewal cycle. May differ from the membership's frozen coupon_snapshot — coupons may be renewable or non-renewable per tenant config.

coupon_snapshot.description: SNAPSHOT of the coupon at THIS renewal cycle. IMMUTABLE post-create.

tax_amount_cents.description: Recomputed from CURRENT tax rates (not from membership's frozen tax_calculation_snapshot). New VAT rates apply to renewals.

total_amount_cents.description: amount_cents - discount_amount_cents + tax_amount_cents. The final charged amount.

attempt_number.description: 1 = first attempt at next_renewal_at. 2 = retry at day+3. 3 = retry at day+7. 4 = retry at day+14. attempt_number > 4 is invalid — reaching 4 without success triggers lapsed transition.

status.description: Enum: pending / attempting / succeeded / failed_transient / failed_permanent / cancelled.

failure_reason.description: Gateway error class + short message. Never store PAN or auth codes.

next_attempt_at.description: Scheduled time for the next attempt in the retry ladder. Null for terminal statuses.

indexes.name: membership_renewals_retry_ladder_idx
indexes.predicate: status = 'failed_transient' AND next_attempt_at IS NOT NULL

x-invariants: APPEND-ONLY — no soft-delete; retention is 7 years financial
tenant_id + membership_id + period_starts_at + period_ends_at + amount_cents + currency + coupon_snapshot + attempt_number are IMMUTABLE post-create
status transitions: pending → attempting → {succeeded, failed_transient, failed_permanent, cancelled}
attempt_number progression: 1 → 2 (at day+3) → 3 (at day+7) → 4 (at day+14) → terminal fail (lapses membership)
next_attempt_at is null for terminal statuses (succeeded, failed_permanent, cancelled)
failure_reason NEVER contains PAN or auth codes — PCI-DSS scope excludes this table
